name: Comparison of Object References Instead of Object Contents
description: The product compares object references (memory addresses) instead of object contents, preventing detection of logically equivalent objects. This commonly manifests in Java when using == instead of .equals() for String or boxed primitive comparisons.
detection_pattern: CONTROL(comparison) node uses reference equality on objects flowing from INGRESS or STORAGE nodes. The comparison lacks a TRANSFORM(content_extraction) step that would compare actual values rather than references, leading to incorrect branching in CONTROL flow.
